# Test fixtures — provenance

`hello.lazy`, `reverse.lazy`, and `rot13.lazy` are example programs from the
Lazy K distribution by Ben Rudiak-Gould (2002) and Michael Sullivan (2011),
distributed under the GNU GPL — see <https://github.com/msullivan/LazyK>.

They are vendored here **unmodified**, solely as conformance test fixtures. This
project is licensed GPL-3.0-or-later, which is compatible. Expected outputs are
asserted in `tests/programs.rs`.
